title: gyrocheilos lasiocalyx
intro: Gyrocheilos lasiocalyx is a species of flowering plant in the family Dipterocarpaceae, commonly found in Southeast Asia. It has been traditionally used in medicine due to its potential medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Gyrocheilos lasiocalyx may include reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and protecting against oxidative stress. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in infusions, decoctions, and extracts, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
